name: governance-gate
description: Policy enforcer that compiles RULES.md + CLAUDE.md into a PolicyBundle, injects active policy context into session prompts via purpose-gate, and provides ContinueGate alignment checks to prevent session purpose drift.

user_message.description: Current user message to check for purpose alignment

policy_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the compiled PolicyBundle (first 16 hex chars)

alignment_ratio.description: 0.0-1.0 keyword alignment between user_message and session purpose

continue_gate_warning.description: Warning message if alignment < 10% and message is substantial, else null

rules_sections.description: Top-level section headings extracted from RULES.md

claude_sections.description: Top-level section headings extracted from CLAUDE.md
